validation_rules.wp_coverage: Every wp_id in the request must appear in the response
validation_rules.partner_coverage: Every partner_id in the request must appear in the response
validation_rules.no_negative_values: All numeric budget values must be non-negative

demo_mode_note: This is a minimal interface contract for demo/placeholder mode. A production contract would include additional field-level type constraints, value ranges, and protocol versioning rules.
